So soon as u load into it the guy says oh I’ll be back soon and nothing happens and if u get into it you can’t get in a public sever which sucks since no players want to be alone they want to talk to people and if u download this game there’s nothing u can do just sit and wait worst game ever and why not but 1 star to

developer_response.body: if you are stuck in the tutorial, press the button on the ceiling lamp to progress, and if you want to play with other people, join code 1 as that is where most the players play. if its empty that means no one is online. another way is to get some friends to play with your in a private code. Please udpate your review if you figure it out
